failures.meaning: No AppState tree delta was produced.
failures.nextAction: Inspect command binding and delta engine.

failures.meaning: Nodes were inserted under the wrong parent.
failures.nextAction: Fix selectedNodeId propagation and selection context.

failures.meaning: New map/scope or unrelated subtree was created.
UI opened or showed success but AppState did not change.
failures.nextAction: Add model assertion and state write.

failures.meaning: AppState changed but browser did not render the change.
Generated labels are map-shaped but semantically poor.
Mapify I/O round-trip lost M3E-specific fields.
Live Mapify call failed due to auth/quota/UI automation.

failures.nextAction: Abort patch and narrow file scope.

failures.meaning: Node labels are long sentences or explanatory clauses.
Siblings mix classes, examples, meta concepts, and unrelated terms.
Generated child duplicates an existing sibling/subtree label.
failures.nextAction: Add sibling duplicate filter before applying delta.
